creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
When considering whether to file a bug I often face a dilemma: either dump the idea quickly or postpone until later but that later rarely happens. In case of typos, poor wording, rants, etc. imperfect bugs quickly turn into confusing mess. To improve the experience it'd help if users could edit their comments.

Maybe investigate how comment editing is implemented on bugzilla.mozilla.org.
